title: ottleya mearnsii
intro: Ottleya mearnsii, also known as Mearns' acacia or Ottleya, is a flowering plant species in the legume family that is native to Mexico. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ottleya mearnsii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Ottleya mearnsii include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
